results.title: Dnd Kit
results.description: dnd kit is a modern, feature-packed, and extensible drag and drop toolkit for React, offering customizable collision detection, multiple input methods, and accessibility support.

results.title: Dnd Kit
results.description: Dnd Kit is a library for building drag and drop interfaces with support for React and Vanilla JavaScript, offering extensibility through plugins, sensors, and modifiers.

results.title: dnd-kit-solid
results.description: dnd-kit-solid is a modern, lightweight, performant, accessible, and extensible drag & drop toolkit that brings the power of dnd-kit to SolidJS applications with the same great API and features.

results.title: @dnd-kit
results.description: A lightweight, modular, performant, accessible, and extensible drag & drop toolkit for React. It offers hooks like useDraggable and useDroppable, supports multiple input methods, and is highly customizable.

results.title: Dnd Kit Svelte
results.description: A Svelte port of the dnd-kit library, offering a modern, lightweight, performant, accessible, and extensible drag & drop toolkit for Svelte applications.

results.title: Vue DnD Kit
results.description: A modern, lightweight, and high-performance drag and drop library for Vue 3 applications, offering composable APIs, TypeScript support, and accessibility features.

results.title: Dnd Kit Sortable Tree
results.description: A sortable tree component extracted and abstracted from dndkit examples, allowing customizable tree structures with drag-and-drop functionality.

results.title: dnd-timeline
results.description: dnd-timeline is a headless, hook-based timeline library built on dnd-kit, offering flexible, performant, and touch-supported drag-and-drop functionality for creating interactive timelines with zero styling.

results.title: dnd-timeline
results.description: dnd-timeline is a headless, hook-based UI for creating performant and flexible timelines, built on dnd-kit, offering RTL and touch support.

results.title: dpkit
results.description: dpkit is a fast data management framework built on the Data Package standard and Polars DataFrames, supporting various formats and integrating with data platforms.

results.title: dpkit-typescript
results.description: dpkit is a fast data management framework built on the Data Package standard and Polars DataFrames, supporting various formats and integrating with data platforms.

results.title: Solid DnD
results.description: A lightweight, performant, extensible drag and drop toolkit for Solid JS.

results.title: RDKit
results.description: RDKit is a collection of cheminformatics and machine-learning software written in C++ and Python, offering molecular operations, descriptor generation, and database cartridge support.

results.title: DivKit
results.description: DivKit is an open-source Server-Driven UI (SDUI) framework that enables server-sourced updates to app versions and allows for cross-platform UI prototyping for iOS, Android, and Web.

results.title: Nostr Development Kit
results.description: NDK is a Nostr development kit that enhances the experience of building Nostr-related applications with comprehensive NIP support and various caching and subscription management features.

results.title: Insight Toolkit
results.description: The Insight Toolkit (ITK) is an open-source, cross-platform toolkit for N-dimensional scientific image processing, segmentation, and registration.

results.title: StoreKit
results.description: https://deepwiki.com/zhangyu1818/StoreKit.md

results.title: DownloadKit
results.description: DownloadKit 是一个基于 Python 的简洁易用的多线程文件下载工具，支持大文件分块下载、自动任务调度、连接失败重试以及文件名冲突处理。

results.title: Deepin Tool Kit Widget
results.description: Deepin Tool Kit Widget (DtkWidget) provides the base widgets for the Deepin desktop environment.

results.title: DRF Auth Kit
results.description: DRF Auth Kit provides a set of authentication tools and utilities for Django Rest Framework applications.

results.title: Tantokit
results.description: Tantokit is a powerful library simplifying wallet connection management for Ronin DApps, enhancing user experience and integration.

results.title: Data Plane Development Kit
results.description: DPDK is a set of libraries and drivers for fast packet processing, supporting multiple processor architectures and operating systems like FreeBSD and Linux.

results.title: DCMTK
results.description: DCMTK is a comprehensive DICOM toolkit providing software libraries and applications for implementing parts of the DICOM/MEDICOM Standard, including data encoding, image processing, and networking functionalities.

results.title: Media Kit
results.description: A cross-platform video and audio player for Flutter and Dart, supporting Android, iOS, macOS, Windows, Linux, and Web.

results.title: Dogokit Akita
results.description: Dogokit Akita is a comprehensive, opinionated full-stack application development kit for building scalable web applications with JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, React, and more.

results.title: SnapKit
results.description: SnapKit is a Domain Specific Language (DSL) that simplifies Auto Layout constraints for both iOS and OS X development.

results.title: Deepin Tool Kit Gui
results.description: Deepin Tool Kit (DtkGui) is the development graphical user interface for C++/Qt developers working on Deepin projects.

results.title: DNS Toolbox
results.description: dnst is a toolset for DNS operators, offering a Rust-based replacement for LDNS tools and a toolbox for zone and nameserver maintenance.

results.title: .NET Library Starter Kit
results.description: A battle-tested starter kit for building open-source and internal NuGet libraries, offering multi-targeting, CI/CD integration, code coverage, static analysis, and more.

results.title: DivKit
results.description: DivKit is a declarative UI framework for building user interfaces, featuring various elements, modifiers, and supporting Kotlin DSL.
